THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAVCHANKO, KATHERINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1334 VAN NESS AVE. #509 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL AUG-04-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES ALL BACK RENT & DAMAGES TO 8/4/98; MUTUAL REL FR ANY & ALL CLAIMS; PERS PROP LEFT AFTER 8/4/98 WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED; NO FURTHER STAYS; IF DEFT VAC & TURNS IN KEYS BY 12 NOON 8/4/98, PLTF WILL EXECUTE STIP TO VAC JDGMENT & REQ FOR DISM W/ PREJUDICE PROVIDED DEFT PREPARES DOCUMENTS.
